name: Baked Acorn Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the squash in half crosswise and scoop out the pulp and seeds.
2. Trim the bottoms, if necessary, so that the squash will stand hollow side up.
3. Place 2 tablespoons honey in the hollow of each squash, then add 1 tablespoon butter or margarine to each and a twist or two of fresh ground pepper.
4. Place squash in a large, shallow baking pan and bake, uncovered, in a moderate oven (350°F), for about 2 1/2 hours or until the squash are tender.
